positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for picuris_positive.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for picuris_positive.tptp
1. located_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | located_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [input(axiom)]
2. visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains) [input(axiom)]
3. has_mine(picuris_mountains,harding_pegmatite_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((located_in(X0,X1) & has_mine(X0,X2) & donated(X2)) => X1 != texas) [input(axiom)]
6. ? [X0] : (visited(juan_de_onate,X0) & located_in(X0,new_mexico)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~? [X0] : (visited(juan_de_onate,X0) & located_in(X0,new_mexico)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (X1 != texas | (~located_in(X0,X1) | ~has_mine(X0,X2) | ~donated(X2))) [ennf transformation 5]
9. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (X1 != texas | ~located_in(X0,X1) | ~has_mine(X0,X2) | ~donated(X2)) [flattening 8]
10. ! [X0] : (~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~located_in(X0,new_mexico)) [ennf transformation 7]
11. located_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | located_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [cnf transformation 1]
12. visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 2]
13. has_mine(picuris_mountains,harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 3]
14. donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 4]
15. texas != X1 | ~located_in(X0,X1) | ~has_mine(X0,X2) | ~donated(X2) [cnf transformation 9]
16. ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~located_in(X0,new_mexico) [cnf transformation 10]
17. ~has_mine(X0,X2) | ~located_in(X0,texas) | ~donated(X2) [equality resolution 15]
19. 1 <=> located_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [avatar definition]
21. located_in(picuris_mountains,texas) <- (1) [avatar component clause 19]
23. 2 <=> located_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [avatar definition]
25. located_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) <- (2) [avatar component clause 23]
26. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 11,23,19]
27. ~located_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [resolution 12,16]
28. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 27,25]
29. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 28]
30. ~located_in(picuris_mountains,texas) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [resolution 17,13]
31. ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 30,21]
32. $false <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 31,14]
33. ~1 [avatar contradiction clause 32]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 26]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 29]
s3. ~1 [sat_conversion 33]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
34. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for picuris_positive.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for picuris_negative.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~located_in(picuris_mountains,texas)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    located_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~has_mine(X0,X2) | ~located_in(X0,texas) | ~donated(X2)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    donated(harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    has_mine(picuris_mountains,harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    located_in(sK0,new_mexico)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define visited(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
